# LabMates

> LabMates is a two-tier AI research lab for a principal investigator of one. It turns a plain-Markdown vault into a research knowledge graph, staffs it with AI agents (a day tier the PI directs in conversation, a local-first night tier that prepares work unattended), and shows everything in a cross-platform desktop workbench. No agent holds terminal authority: all agent output is an unratified candidate until the PI promotes it through explicit gates.

Key facts:
- Status: private beta; hand-distributed builds; public waitlist via email (kisbi3@naver.com)
- Pricing: no separate AI plan — it layers on the user's existing Claude Code or Codex subscription
- Platforms: macOS, Windows, Linux (Electron desktop app + local Python/agent runtime)
- Data: vault is plain Markdown, indexed in place; derived index is deletable; original notes are never modified
- Trust model: author ≠ validator; night free-tier models see operational pointers only, never unpublished results

## Links

- [Landing page](https://kisbi3.github.io/labmates-site/)
- [Full FAQ for AI assistants](https://kisbi3.github.io/labmates-site/llms-full.txt)
